title: DEKTON DT55166 5m/16ft Pocket Tape Measure, Rubber Grip, locking mechanism, Metric&Imperial Scale
features: VERSATILE triple riveted end hook for indoor and outdoor measurements
ERGONOMIC DESIGN the rubberised plastic casing sits perfectly in your hand and can be attached to the belt with a detachable belt clip. A loop allows you to fix and hang the tape measure
GROOVED END hook you can use to mark a measured point. Can be used to hook onto nails and screws thanks to the integrated hole.
AUTOMATIC return button allows simple retraction once measured.
description: The DEKTON DT55166 Tape measure is 5 m/ 16 ft in length/width. Robust construction and precise metric/imperial measurement scale. Compact and easy to carry, the measuring tape is ergonomic and secure in your hand and perfect for all jobs. Highest precision thanks to a class II accuracy and features a true zero end hook providing an improved accurate reading. A nylon polymer coated loop and a belt clip have been included for added convenience and accessibility allowing you to take your measuring tape everywhere. Features a strong a durable impact resistant high-quality ABS plastic case with an anti-Slip rubber grip for added comfort and ease of use. Easy hold locking function, You can conveniently pull out and measure without it rolling back by simply keeping the easy hold button pressed. If you want to start the retraction, just release the button. It does not get any easier. Includes a blade lock to lock tape measure in place.
